problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
mechanism: Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region
hypothesis: If Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region is applied to reversed, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 22 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
